parameters.jsCode: var inp=$input.first().json; if(inp.ok===false) return [{json:{ok:false,data:null,message_for_agent:inp.message_for_agent||null,error_code:inp.error_code,meta:{version:'v1'}}}]; return [{json:{ok:true,data:inp._result,message_for_agent: inp._msg||null,error_code:null,meta:{version:'v1',duration_ms: inp._t0?(Date.now()-inp._t0):null}}}];
